purpose: Prioritized irregular structural families for expert-wow demos and AI generalization.

families.why_it_matters: Visible transfer podiums expose sharp load-path jumps and are common in real high-rises.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: transfer-story demand ratio; column discontinuity penalty; load-path continuity

families.why_it_matters: Canonical soft-story risk with clear drift concentration and strong regression value.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: story stiffness ratio; interstory drift concentration; P-Delta amplification

families.why_it_matters: Offset core or mass eccentricity makes torsion and modal coupling easy to see and hard to fake.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: torsional irregularity index; corner drift spread; center-of-rigidity offset

families.why_it_matters: Setbacks are a classic vertical irregularity that break stiffness and mass continuity.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: setback-level demand jump; story shear redistribution; mode-shape discontinuity

families.why_it_matters: L/U/T-plan corners concentrate diaphragm shear and edge drift, making them useful for torsion-aware learning.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: corner drift amplification; diaphragm shear concentration; torsion/drift ratio

families.why_it_matters: Megatall outriggers are a showpiece and stress coupled core-perimeter load sharing.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: core drift reduction; outrigger force share; top-out drift limit

families.why_it_matters: Brace discontinuities create real weak-story behavior and expose load-path breaks beyond simple soft stories.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: brace force redistribution; weak-story check; drift concentration

families.why_it_matters: Suspended floors and hanging columns are excellent demonstrations of reverse load flow and transfer demand.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: hanging-member force path completeness; transfer deflection; secondary-force amplification

families.why_it_matters: Diagrid exoskeletons are visually strong and test perimeter stiffness reasoning under asymmetry.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: perimeter-to-core stiffness share; lateral efficiency; node stress concentration

families.why_it_matters: Linked towers and split cores are a good coupled-system benchmark with clear visual wow.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: inter-tower drift differential; link force demand; coupling mode separation

families.why_it_matters: Large overhangs make load reversal and support demand obvious.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: tip deflection; support moment ratio; gravity-lateral interaction

families.why_it_matters: Abrupt mass changes shift modes and acceleration demands in a way learning systems should notice.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: mode-shape jump; story acceleration ratio; mass-stiffness mismatch index

families.why_it_matters: A large internal void creates tricky diaphragm flow and strong perimeter demand.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: diaphragm shear flow around void; torsion amplification; perimeter concentration

families.why_it_matters: Twist plus taper is a compact geometry stress test for shape-aware models.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: twist angle vs drift; stiffness-gradient sensitivity; coupled-mode ratio

families.why_it_matters: Grade changes create practical irregularity that is easy to miss in high-level summaries.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: base reaction imbalance; story-to-story discontinuity; foundation demand skew

families.why_it_matters: Nonorthogonal grids are a low-noise way to test geometry-aware load transfer.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: skew-induced secondary forces; connection demand; plan response coupling

families.why_it_matters: Bridge skew broadens the track beyond towers and tests support asymmetry cleanly.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: support reaction spread; torsional twist under asymmetric load; span continuity

families.why_it_matters: Curved bridges are a standard torsion problem and give the corpus a civil-structure edge case.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: curvature-induced torsion; lane-load asymmetry; lateral-torsional coupling

families.why_it_matters: Irregular roof trusses are useful for big-span demos and partial-load response learning.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: deflection under partial loading; support reaction imbalance; member utilization spread

families.why_it_matters: A shell-plus-core hybrid is the most visually distinctive capstone and the hardest geometry bucket.
families.recommended_kpi_or_validation_angle: geometry-to-response consistency; shell membrane action; local instability sensitivity
